title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costa Coffee India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costa Coffee India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
